name: Fresh Tomato Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 stick chilled butter, cut into cubes
2 1/2 pounds medium-sized ripe slicing tomatoes, peeled and sliced
4 ounces grated medium-sharp or sharp Cheddar (2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift or mix together the flour, black peppercorns, baking powder, 1 teaspoon salt.
2. Work the butter into the flour mixture until it has the consistency of coarse-grain sand using a pastry blender or food processor.
3. Add milk and pulse quickly (2-3 times) until the dough barely comes together. Turn out onto a floured surface.
4. Knead the dough for about 30 seconds, then let rest for 10 minutes.
5. Roll out half of the dough to fit a 10-inch pie pan and line it.
6. Cover with layers of tomatoes, salt, basil leaves, grated cheese, and lemon-cream mixture.
7. Roll out reserved dough over the pie and seal edges by pinching together.
8. Brush surface with heavy cream and bake at 350°F until hot and crust is golden (25-30 minutes).
9. Let rest for 15 minutes before serving. Cut into wedges and garnish each slice with a basil leaf.
Converted by MCBuster.
